ORDER GRANTING RICHARD ANAYA PERMISSION TO APPEAR TELEPHONICALLY FOR MAY 21, 2008 HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS CHIEF JUSTICE RONALD GEORGE AND JUDGE RISE JONES PICHON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE IT IS APPARENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS ALLEGING ACTS TAKEN OR NOT TAKEN BY DEFENDANTS IN THEIR CAPACITY AS JUDICIAL OFFICERS PRESIDING OVER PLAINTIFF'S CASE, FOR WHICH THEY ARE ABSOLUTELY IMMUNE. WHATEVER RIGHTS PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE IN THE CONTEXT OF CHALLENGING HIS CRIMINAL CONVICTION, PLEA AGREEMENT AND SENTENCE, HE CANNOT ASSERT THOSE RIGHTS IN THIS COLLATERAL CIVIL ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : DEFENDANTS CHIEF JUSTICE RONALD GEORGE AND JUDGE RISE JONES PICHON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE IT IS APPARENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS ALLEGING ACTS TAKEN OR NOT TAKEN BY DEFENDANTS IN THEIR CAPACITY AS JUDICIAL OFFICERS PRESIDING OVER PLAINTIFF'S CASE, FOR WHICH THEY ARE ABSOLUTELY IMMUNE. WHATEVER RIGHTS PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE IN THE CONTEXT OF CHALLENGING HIS CRIMINAL CONVICTION, PLEA AGREEMENT AND SENTENCE, HE CANNOT ASSERT THOSE RIGHTS IN THIS COLLATERAL CIVIL ACTION. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/LB)
